mapper.insert: insert into user_friend (user_id, friend_id, category_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{friendId}, #{categoryId}, now())
mapper.select: select f.friend_id as friendId, f.category_id as categoryId, fc.name as categoryName, u.username, u.nickname, u.signature, u.avatar, u.profile_background as profileBackground, u.role_id as roleId, u.private_chat_enabled as privateChatEnabled, u.status, f.create_time as createTime from user_friend f join sys_user u on u.id = f.friend_id left join friend_category fc on fc.id = f.category_id where f.user_id = #{userId} order by fc.sort asc, fc.id asc, f.create_time desc
